acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Retries within one reconciliation cycle share an operation identity
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: The cycle ID is created once per reconciliation invocation and reused for all request-layer retries.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Later cycles re-evaluate runs that were previously non-terminal
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Each invocation receives fresh timestamp and cryptographic entropy while retaining the run identity.
The fix only changes normalized game-api operation identity; no direct provider access is introduced.
306 tests, 100% coverage, zero Credo issues and zero Dialyzer errors.

summary: Terminal reconciliation now uses per-cycle idempotency scopes and is ready for exact live acceptance.
